scripts.dev: npm run build -w agents && concurrently -n frontend,backend,agents -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w agents"
scripts.build: npm run build -w agents && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w agents
